draft.conclusion: 评审结论：存在阻塞问题，请求修改。

findings.problem: The patch special-cases one adjacent-parameter shape (dash separator) but does not remove the general overlapping-capture ReDoS. separator 分隔符 overlap 重叠 custom pattern 自定义 模式 still backtrack 仍 回溯
findings.evidence: Only token.suffix === '-' is tightened. Routes with other separators (e.g. /:a.:b, /:a_:b), custom-pattern captures, or repeat/optional modifiers still compile to overlapping ([^/]+?)<sep>([^/]+?) regexes that backtrack on long inputs and block the Node event loop. custom-pattern token.suffix
findings.impact: Only token.suffix === '-' is tightened. Routes with other separators (e.g. /:a.:b, /:a_:b), custom-pattern captures, or repeat/optional modifiers still compile to overlapping ([^/]+?)<sep>([^/]+?) regexes that backtrack on long inputs and block the Node event loop. custom-pattern token.suffix
findings.fix: Fix the compiler so every adjacent capture has an unambiguous boundary for any separator (or emit atomic/possessive-style patterns), or upgrade to a patched path-to-regexp version. possessive-style path-to-regexp

draft.tests: The added test only exercises the one route shape that was fixed. It covers /:a-:b with a dash separator; other separators, custom captures and repeated params are untested, so the suite stays green while the ReDoS class remains. test only 测试 只 test separator 测试 分隔符 missing test 缺 测试
